reviews.comment:
La atención de las chicas que atienden full son espectaculares se desarman para atender bien cosa poco muy poco frecuente en este país además muy limpio y muy completo tienen de todo!!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the staff is spectacular; they go out of their way to provide excellent service, which is very rare in this country. Plus, it's very clean and fully equipped; they have everything!
